name_en: P【New】Hot-selling linen color, a touch of romantic Turkish style, a different fashion style for fabric! Worth noting is that the developed linen material has a much higher linen content than market goods. Don't worry if you don't understand; sufficient linen content makes it more wear-resistant and better looking! Size: 22cm, Code 498892
